kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your jobs organized and your clients happy. Ready to tackle today's fix-it list?

quickActions.label: Schedule a job
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new handyman job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for a handyman job.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What handyman jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a handyman business. You help manage a wide variety of repair and maintenance jobs, coordinate scheduling, handle estimates for residential and commercial clients, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We handle all kinds of home repairs and odd jobs. What can we help you fix today?
commonReasons: Get a quote for a project
Report an issue with previous work

steps.title: Name your handyman business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where you take on jobs.

steps.title: Add your services
steps.body: List the types of jobs you handle: plumbing, drywall, painting, furniture assembly, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure your hourly rate, minimum job charge, and flat fees for common tasks.

steps.title: Add your team
steps.body: Add team members or subcontractors so you can assign and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your handyman business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a handyman business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage repair and maintenance jobs
Create estimates for a wide variety of home repair tasks
Coordinate daily job schedules and routes
Track materials and parts needed for each job
Send automated appointment reminders to clients
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage repeat clients and their property histories
Analyze revenue by job type and client
